subject: Re: Shamatha Project Proposal Gestating
body:
deadlines ,,are just that... relax

--- Clifford Saron <cdsaron@ucdavis.edu> wrote:

> Hi Jeffery - I wanted to get back to you. I've been
> rewriting our major
> proposal for you so it corresponds as closely as
> possible to what were are
> currently doing / planning. Some fascinating
> additional collaborative
> opportunities with a biological psychiatrist at UC
> San Francisco have just
> come up and we are incorporating more sophisticated
> assays of stress-related
> neuroendocrine and immune system changes into our
> protocol. This has taken
> some more time than I had figured. I'm off to an
> autism conference in the
> morning and will be working to finish this up as
> soon as I can. We want to
> give you as accurate a picture technically and
> fiscally as we can for the
> project. Our deadline to get you the proposal will
> be within the next 10
> days. Thanks for your patience,
> 
> Best,
> 
> Cliff
> 
>  
> 
> Clifford Saron, Ph.D.
> 
> Assistant Research Scientist
> 
> UC Davis Center for Mind and Brain

body_html:
deadlines ,,are just that... relax

--- Clifford Saron cdsaron@ucdavis.edu wrote:

Hi Jeffery - I wanted to get back to you. I've been
rewriting our major
proposal for you so it corresponds as closely as
possible to what were are
currently doing / planning. Some fascinating
additional collaborative
opportunities with a biological psychiatrist at UC
San Francisco have just
come up and we are incorporating more sophisticated
assays of stress-related
neuroendocrine and immune system changes into our
protocol. This has taken
some more time than I had figured. I'm off to an
autism conference in the
morning and will be working to finish this up as
soon as I can. We want to
give you as accurate a picture technically and
fiscally as we can for the
project. Our deadline to get you the proposal will
be within the next 10
days. Thanks for your patience,

Best,

Cliff

Clifford Saron, Ph.D.

Assistant Research Scientist

UC Davis Center for Mind and Brain

267 Cousteau Place

Davis, CA 95616

415-307-9757 mobile
